description: Family medicine board exam knowledge base: queryable question bank (1,629 ITE questions, 2018-2025; 1,221 AAFP BRQ questions) linked to a clinical guideline library (1,985 articles, 404 PDFs) via a structured SQLite pipeline. Both ITE and AAFP corpora are schema-parallel with full enrichment (body_system, concept_tags, subcategory, ICD-10). Extends beyond exam prep into clinical decision support.
git_status: main branch. Latest committed: 066a94f. Commit pending for BATON 021-022 session (3 new M2 scripts + BATONs + CLAUDE.md + _index.md).

database.art_id_range: ART-0001 through ART-1986 (ART-0404 deleted/merged; +49 AAFP acquisition 2026-03-28)

module_structure.00_database: Source of truth (DB + supporting data, schemas, logs)
module_structure.01_module.1_warehouse: PDF library (4 tiers, 404 PDFs) + M1 scripts (build/9, maintain/16) + aafp_brq/scraper+staging
module_structure.02_module.2_processor: Extraction + enrichment pipeline (53 Python + 6 JS + 1 JSON + 4 Windows, all paths dynamic)
module_structure.03_module.3_analyst: Analysis scripts (5 Python + 1 JS + 2 JSON config)

supporting_folders.archive_canonical: Curated deliverables (curriculum, question bank, analysis, reference data, acquisition lists)
supporting_folders.extracted_json: Three subfolders: synthesis_library/ (242 legacy flat JSONs), VC_pass_batch/ (95), VC_fail_batch/ (147). Root clean (manifest.json only).
supporting_folders.key_data_files: Critical reference data: VC gate (session_hy_inserts_v7.json), exam CSVs, missing articles list, FILE_NAMING_SPEC, Intelligence 2.0 architecture, project inventory, script library

pdf_library.VC_fail: 146 PDFs (codon-named, awaiting full pipeline — not VC-cited)
pdf_library.pending: 49 PDFs for ART-1938–ART-1986 — download_aafp_acquisitions.py ready to run

codon_convention: Author_Year#@#ART-XXXX@#@.pdf — ART-ID embedded between #@# start and @#@ stop codon. Strategy 0 = regex parse of codon. Primary match strategy in all enrichers.
vc_gate: key_data_files/session_hy_inserts_v7.json (352 citations — sole criterion for right_click vs local_lite tier assignment)

intelligence_layers.layer_1_icd10: COMPLETE — article_icd10 (4,137 rows) + question_icd10 (5,284 rows ITE) + aafp_question_icd10 (4,753 rows). Full symmetry both banks. 2026-03-31.
intelligence_layers.layer_2_pubmed: SEEDED — pubmed_pmid_cache (344 PMIDs). article_currency table not yet built.
intelligence_layers.layer_3_pathways: PARTIAL — 3,093 rows (ART-0002–ART-1397 only). Rebuild pending (build_clinical_pathways_v2.py — blueprint signal, both banks, full range).

designed_not_yet_built.article_citation_trend: Companion table: years_cited, distinct_year_count, first_cited_year, most_recent_year, consecutive_streak, is_watch_list. Derived from qid_art_xref via pure SQL.
designed_not_yet_built.extract_ite_critique_refs.py: M2/scripts/ — local PDF-native critique ref extractor. pdfplumber, dispatcher architecture, zero API cost. Replaces DOCX dependency for future year integration.

built_not_yet_run.update_citation_trends.py: M1/maintain/ — populates article_citation_trend. Pure SQL, no API. ~200 lines. Ready to run.
built_not_yet_run.download_aafp_acquisitions.py: M1/maintain/ — downloads 49 PMC PDFs for ART-1938–1986; codon filenames; places in VC_fail/. Ready to run.

script_path_convention.no_hardcoded_paths: All paths dynamic — no C:\Users\... anywhere in scripts
script_path_convention.no_de_novo_js: New code = Python only. Existing JS scripts migrate fine.

key_conventions.source_data_protected: DB + PDFs + VC gate survive everything. Derivatives (JSONs, DOCXs, CSVs) are disposable.
key_conventions.schema_first: Define SQL schema before writing build script
key_conventions.fix_data_not_code: Upstream data cleanup preferred over defensive code complexity
key_conventions.strategy_0_first: Codon parse always the first matching strategy in every enricher
key_conventions.baton_supersedes_all: Active BATON is the source of truth for current state

aafp_brq.description: AAFP Board Review Questions: 135 quizzes x 10 questions. Separate table schema from ITE questions. Now schema-parallel to ITE (body_system, concept_tags, subcategory, ICD-10 all at 100%).
aafp_brq.pipeline_order: aafp_brq_import.py → compute_embeddings.py --aafp-only → aafp_keyword_extractor.py → aafp_merge_keywords.py → aafp_context_propagator.py → aafp_assign_body_system.py → aafp_vector_explorer.py --save → aafp_enrich_concept_tags.py --mode linked → aafp_enrich_concept_tags.py --mode unlinked
aafp_brq.key_finding: Near-identical AAFP-ITE pairs at dist<0.27 confirm likely direct question reuse. 38 shared-vignette pairs identified (BATON 020). Linked vs unlinked mean dist gap: 0.4497 vs 0.6973.
aafp_brq.model_selection: Haiku 4.5 selected for concept_tags enrichment — ~3x cost savings vs Sonnet 4.6 at near-identical quality (BATON 022 comparison study)

AAFP vs ITE trend comparison — both corpora schema-parallel; body_system + concept_tags + ICD-10 side-by-side

Fill question vector gaps — 440 ITE (2018–2019) + 1,221 AAFP → question_vec
LOW: FLAG 33 — VC_pass ART-ID rename scheme: designed, not implemented
